_comment: Per-repo chart→canonical-source-view mapping for data-cross-check-nudge.js. Hook fires ONLY when an edit matches a `pathContains` rule below AND has a matching extension. Generic .svelte components (EmptyState, FreshnessLabel, DashboardHeader, etc.) are intentionally NOT included — this hook is narrowly scoped to chart cards that show aggregated data.

rules.bucketingHint: SUM(amount_cents)/100 grouped by date_trunc(grain, business_date), where grain ∈ {day, week, month}
rules.notes: Locale-aware week start: Monday for de/ja/es/fr.

rules.bucketingHint: COUNT(DISTINCT bill_id) grouped by date_trunc(grain, business_date)
SUM(qty) grouped by item_name × date_trunc(grain, business_date)
rules.notes: Component does its OWN .filter() — the 2026-04-20 bug. Verify it includes EVERY filter dim from filterRows().

rules.bucketingHint: SUM(revenue_cents)/100 grouped by item_name × date_trunc(grain, business_date)
rules.notes: Same self-filtering pattern as CalendarItemsCard — verify filter dim coverage.

rules.bucketingHint: retention_rate per cohort_month × period_index. Sparse-cohort filter: cohorts with size < SPARSE_MIN_COHORT_SIZE are excluded — apply the same filter in SQL.
AVG(amount_cents)/100 grouped by EXTRACT(DOW FROM business_date) × hour_of_day. activeDays filter applies in WHERE.
COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) grouped by cohort × visit_count band. Stacked bars — sum of bands per cohort = total cohort size.

rules.sourceView: depends on the `value` prop's source — trace the parent in src/routes/+page.svelte to see which view feeds the prop, then aggregate that view directly
rules.bucketingHint: Scalar — single aggregated value, not bucketed. Compare displayed value to SUM/COUNT/AVG of source view with current filter.
